title: The Road to Sabaody: Key Exchange
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #3, Whitebeard as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The amusement park!!? We'll look there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's not something that happens every day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There's someone higher up than Luffy!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We're right under the Marine Headquarter's nose.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Where's my food!? I'm almost out!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well then, they need to go faster!!!

summary: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: key exchange.
